title: Cluster Coverage Heatmap
description: Visual grid showing publish status per cluster × content type (pillar/supporting/expansion)

title: Publication Velocity Chart
description: Line chart of posts published per week across phases

title: Live Gate Status Panel
description: Real-time display of last 10 posts evaluated with gate pass/fail breakdown

title: Drift Alert Banner
description: Top-of-dashboard alert when QDD detects metric drift

title: Keyword Gap List
description: Sortable table of target keywords not yet covered, with estimated search volume

title: Internal Link Graph
description: D3.js force graph visualising all internal links between posts

title: Indexing Status Column
description: Show Google indexing status (indexed/crawled/not indexed) per post from GSC API

title: Publish Queue Manager
description: UI to review Lane B posts, approve/reject, set publish time

title: Prompt Version Switcher
description: Dropdown to select active prompt version per cluster before generation run

title: Post Performance Table
description: Weekly clicks/impressions/rank from GSC per post, sortable

title: Trust Page Status Widget
description: Shows publish/draft status, last-updated date, and cross-link count for all 4 trust pages

title: One-Click Expansion Run
description: Button to trigger full cluster expansion workflow for selected cluster
